# @codenhub/styles

> CSS-only Codenhub design tokens, reset, typography, layout and content utilities, component classes, native-element styling, and Tailwind CSS v4 source entrypoints.

Use compiled entrypoints for ready-to-import CSS or `/tw` entrypoints in a Tailwind CSS v4 build. The package has no JavaScript behavior. `--layout-gap` is the only shared layout gap token; removed stack and cluster gap tokens have no compatibility aliases.

## Documentation

- [README](./README.md): Installation, entrypoints, first use, requirements, and migration notes.
- [Overview](./docs/index.md): Package model, supported entrypoints, and class composition.
- [Tokens](./docs/tokens.md): Public CSS custom-property contract.
- [Classes](./docs/classes.md): Layout, content, component, and typography helper reference.
- [Accessibility](./docs/accessibility.md): CSS accessibility behavior and consumer responsibilities.
